name: Kill - Suffer - Return
author: Robby
bootlegger: The Shabaloth can't pick dead players. If the night ends with 2 alive players left but 2 died in the night due to the Shabaloth, one of them might get regurgitated and their death is not announced.
If the Shabaloth kills themselves with a sober and healthy Mastermind in play, the Mastermind ability will activate.
